case_title: EMILIO JAVIER CASAL VS. PAK AUTO SERVICE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PAK AUTO SERVICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASAL, EMILIO JAVIER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PAK AUTO SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,479.42 FILED BY CASAL, EMILIO JAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT PAK AUTO SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF EMILIO JAVIER CASAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAK AUTO SERVICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NAZIR SAYED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED MAR-28-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAK AUTO SERVICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2024 - JUDGMENT.
